the street car lines of the Wash
ington Water Power Co. will be alb

The only hitch that exists over

OF clear field as far as lighting is

II the Graves people will not

ing business they can have the

1t is stated that the w. w. P.

tory profit for the money invested

continual war with organized labor.
and has never appeared to be able
to operate transportation In the
same class as its rival. Constant
and heavy expenditures in extern
slons and improvements have been
demanded in order to keep the sys-
TEN abreast OF the Graves projects,
and in this contest the latter COM
pany has come out on top, build
ing up great system although en-
